positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a celestial forest at twilight. Giant, bioluminescent mushrooms cast soft, vibrant blues and glowing emerald greens onto smooth, obsidian-like ground. Gentle, stylized fauna, such as luminous moths and spectral deer silhouettes, inhabit the scene. The composition is centered and symmetrical, featuring strong contrast between the deep, velvety black background and the ethereal, saturated glowing flora. Ideal for a seamless, repeating apparel print. Clean lines, highly contrasted silhouettes, volumetric lighting, magical realism, intricate details, vector illustration style, deep contrast, poster grade.
negative: blurry, text, logo, watermark, low resolution, poor anatomy, bad silhouette, dirty, grainy, artifacts, extra limbs, noisy, noise
